_meta.id_gap_policy: Reserve numeric ranges per category. Retired IDs are NEVER re-used.

history.delta: +0 N5 prerequisite + 128 N4 new (seed; examples + form_rules to be authored)

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: while; during; between. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 夏休みの 間、毎日 海に 行きました。
examples.translation_en: During summer vacation, I went to the sea every day.

patterns.meaning_ja: ある期間に、何かが起きる。
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: while; during (something happened). See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 母が でかけている 間に、しゅくだいを しました。
examples.translation_en: While mother was out, I did my homework.

patterns.meaning_ja: たくさんではない、少しだけ。
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: not very; not much. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: この 料理は あまり すきじゃ ありません。
examples.translation_en: I don't like this dish very much.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: after; later. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 仕事の 後で、友だちと 食事を します。
examples.translation_en: After work, I'll have a meal with my friends.

patterns.category: Conditionals (たら / ば / なら / と)
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: conditional form (if-then). See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 雨が ふれば、行きません。
examples.translation_en: If it rains, I won't go.

patterns.meaning_en: in the event of; in case that
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: in the event of; in case that. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 火事の ばあいは、すぐに 出てください。
examples.translation_en: In case of fire, please leave immediately.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: only; nothing but. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: テレビばかり 見ないで、勉強してください。
examples.translation_en: Don't only watch TV; please study.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: just by; by doing alone. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 見るだけで、買いません。
examples.translation_en: I'm just looking, not buying.

patterns.meaning_en: to begin to; start to; burst into
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to begin to; start to; burst into. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 急に 雨が ふりだしました。
examples.translation_en: It suddenly started to rain.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to be (honorific). See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: こちらは 田中で ございます。
examples.translation_en: This is Tanaka (humble/polite).

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: or something; how about. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: お茶でも 飲みませんか。
examples.translation_en: Would you like tea or something?

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: right?; isn't it?. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: これは あなたの かばん ではないか。
examples.translation_en: Isn't this your bag?

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to smell; hear; taste. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: いい 音が します。
examples.translation_en: I hear a nice sound.

patterns.meaning_ja: そういう人だ、という性格。
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: personality/tendency. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 弟は さむがりです。
examples.translation_en: My little brother feels the cold easily.

patterns.meaning_en: to show signs of; appear; feel
patterns.meaning_ja: そう見える、感じている。
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to show signs of; appear; feel. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 妹は 新しい おもちゃを ほしがって います。
examples.translation_en: My little sister wants a new toy.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to be; to exist (polite). See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: あちらに うけつけが ございます。
examples.translation_en: The reception is over there.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to start; to begin to. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 七時から 会ぎを 始めます。
examples.translation_en: The meeting starts at seven o'clock.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: it must be; should be. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 田中さんは 今日 来る はずです。
examples.translation_en: Tanaka should come today.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: cannot be (impossible). See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: あの 人が うそを 言う はずが ありません。
examples.translation_en: There's no way that person would lie.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: need to; it is necessary. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 駅まで 行く ひつようが あります。
examples.translation_en: I need to go to the station.

patterns.meaning_ja: 「いる/来る/行く」のていねいな形。
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to be; come; go (polite). See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 先生は 教室に いらっしゃいます。
examples.translation_en: The teacher is in the classroom.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to do (polite form). See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 私が ごあんない いたします。
examples.translation_en: I will guide you (humble).

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: right?; isn't it?; let's. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: いっしょに 行こう じゃないか。
examples.translation_en: Let's go together, shall we?

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: whether or not. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 来るか どうか 分かりません。
examples.translation_en: I don't know whether (he) is coming or not.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: I wonder (feminine). See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 雨が ふる かしら。
examples.translation_en: I wonder if it will rain.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: turns sentence into yes/no question. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: あれは きみの本かい。
examples.translation_en: Is that your book?

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: might; perhaps; possibly. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 明日 雨が ふる かもしれません。
examples.translation_en: It might rain tomorrow.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: I wonder; should I?. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 今 何時かな。
examples.translation_en: I wonder what time it is.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: made from; made with. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: この パンは こめから 作ります。
examples.translation_en: This bread is made from rice.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: surely; undoubtedly; most likely. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: きっと 来ます。
examples.translation_en: (He) will surely come.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: around; about; when. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 三時ころ 着きます。
examples.translation_en: I'll arrive around three o'clock.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: verb nominalizer. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 漢字を 書く ことは むずかしいです。
examples.translation_en: Writing kanji is difficult.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: there are times when. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 京とに 行った ことが あります。
examples.translation_en: I have been to Kyoto.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: can; able to. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 私は 日本語を 話す ことが できます。
examples.translation_en: I can speak Japanese.

patterns.meaning_en: it has been decided; turns out
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: it has been decided; turns out. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 来月 ひっこす ことに なりました。
examples.translation_en: It's been decided that I move next month.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to decide on. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 毎日 早く 起きる ことに しました。
examples.translation_en: I decided to get up early every day.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to make something. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: へやを きれいに します。
examples.translation_en: I will clean the room (make it tidy).

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: quickly; suddenly; abruptly. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 子どもが 急に 走り出しました。
examples.translation_en: The child suddenly began to run.

patterns.meaning_en: by; by the time; indicates time limit
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: by; by the time; indicates time limit. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 五時までに 帰ります。
examples.translation_en: I'll return by five o'clock.

patterns.meaning_en: as it is; current state; without changing
patterns.meaning_ja: 今のままで、変えないで。
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: as it is; current state; without changing. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: くつの まま 入らないでください。
examples.translation_en: Please don't enter with your shoes on.

patterns.meaning_en: both; or; otherwise; choice between [A] or [B]
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: both; or; otherwise; choice between [A] or [B]. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: コーヒー または こうちゃを えらんでください。
examples.translation_en: Please choose coffee or tea.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: like; similar to; resembling. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: あの 人は 学生 みたいだ。
examples.translation_en: That person seems to be a student.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: like, similar to. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 子ども みたいな 人ですね。
examples.translation_en: (He) is a person like a child, isn't he.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: like; similar to. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 鳥 みたいに とびたいです。
examples.translation_en: I want to fly like a bird.

patterns.meaning_en: as many as; as much as; up to; nearly
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: as many as; as much as; up to; nearly. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 一万円も はらいました。
examples.translation_en: I paid as much as ten thousand yen.

patterns.meaning_en: don't ~ (order somebody to not do something)
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: don't ~ (order somebody to not do something). See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: ここで 走るな。
examples.translation_en: Don't run here.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: such as; things like. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: りんごや みかんなどを 買いました。
examples.translation_en: I bought apples, oranges, and so on.

patterns.meaning_ja: 同時に二つのことをする。
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: while; during; as; simultaneously. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 音楽を 聞きながら 勉強します。
examples.translation_en: I study while listening to music.

patterns.meaning_en: not easy to; struggling to; not able to
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: not easy to; struggling to; not able to. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: この 漢字は なかなか おぼえられません。
examples.translation_en: I just can't seem to remember this kanji.

patterns.meaning_en: must do something; have to do something
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: must do something; have to do something. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 毎日 勉強しなければ いけません。
examples.translation_en: I have to study every day.

patterns.meaning_en: must do something; have to do something
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: must do something; have to do something. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: やくそくを まもらなければ なりません。
examples.translation_en: I must keep my promise.

patterns.category: Conditionals (たら / ば / なら / と)
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: if; in the case that. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 安いなら、買います。
examples.translation_en: If it's cheap, I'll buy it.

patterns.meaning_ja: 〜してください（やわらかい命令）。
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: do this (soft/firm command). See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 早く ねなさい。
examples.translation_en: Go to bed early.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to do (honorific). See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 先生は 何を なさいますか。
examples.translation_en: What will the teacher do? (honorific)

patterns.pattern: に気がつく（にきがつく）
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to notice; to realize. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 間ちがいに きがつきました。
examples.translation_en: I noticed the mistake.

patterns.meaning_en: to look; to seem; to appear
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to look; to seem; to appear. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 元気そうに 見えます。
examples.translation_en: (You) look well.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to make something. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: コーヒーに します。
examples.translation_en: I'll have coffee (I'll go with coffee).

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: difficult to do. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: この くつは 歩きにくいです。
examples.translation_en: These shoes are hard to walk in.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: in; among. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: クラスの 中で、田中さんが 一番 せが 高いです。
examples.translation_en: In the class, Tanaka is the tallest.

patterns.meaning_en: although, in spite of, even though
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: although, in spite of, even though. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 勉強したのに、テストが できませんでした。
examples.translation_en: Even though I studied, I couldn't do the test.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to (do something); in order to. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: この ペンは 手紙を 書くのに 使います。
examples.translation_en: I use this pen to write letters.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: [A] is [B]; the reason for [A] is [B]. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 私が 行くのは 来週です。
examples.translation_en: When I go is next week.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: please do ~ (honorific). See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: こちらに おすわりください。
examples.translation_en: Please sit here (honorific).

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to do (honorific). See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 先生が お話しに なります。
examples.translation_en: The teacher will speak (honorific).

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: repeated at intervals, every. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 一日おきに 運動します。
examples.translation_en: I exercise every other day.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to finish; to end. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: コンサートが 九時に 終わりました。
examples.translation_en: The concert ended at nine.

patterns.meaning_en: potential form; ability or inability to do something
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: potential form; ability or inability to do something. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 私は 漢字が 書けます。
examples.translation_en: I can write kanji.

patterns.meaning_en: it seems like; I heard; apparently
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: it seems like; I heard; apparently. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 田中さんは 元気らしいです。
examples.translation_en: Tanaka apparently is well.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: -ness; nominalizer for adjective. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 山の 高さを 知りたいです。
examples.translation_en: I want to know the mountain's height.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: some time ago; just now. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: さっき 駅で 田中さんに 会いました。
examples.translation_en: I just met Tanaka at the station a moment ago.

patterns.meaning_en: causative-passive; to be made to do something
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: causative-passive; to be made to do something. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 子どもの 時、毎日 勉強させられました。
examples.translation_en: When I was a child, I was made to study every day.

patterns.meaning_en: causative form; to make/let somebody do something
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: causative form; to make/let somebody do something. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 母は 弟に へやを そうじさせました。
examples.translation_en: Mother made my little brother clean the room.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: please let me do. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 少し 休ませてください。
examples.translation_en: Please let me rest a little.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: as one would expect; even. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: さすが 田中さんですね。
examples.translation_en: As expected of Tanaka.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: and; and what's more (emphasis). See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: この 店は 安いし、おいしいです。
examples.translation_en: This shop is cheap and (also) delicious.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: so much; so; like that. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: そんなに 食べないでください。
examples.translation_en: Please don't eat so much.

patterns.meaning_en: but still; and yet; even so
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: but still; and yet; even so. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 雨が ふりました。それでも 試あを つづけました。
examples.translation_en: It rained. Even so, we continued the game.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: besides; in addition; also; moreover. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 安いです。それに、おいしいです。
examples.translation_en: It's cheap. Moreover, it's delicious.

patterns.meaning_en: I heard that; it is said that ~
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: I heard that; it is said that ~. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 田中さんは 来ない そうです。
examples.translation_en: I heard that Tanaka isn't coming.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: looks like; appears like; seeming ~. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 雨が ふりそうです。
examples.translation_en: It looks like it's going to rain.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: seems like; looks like ~. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 楽しそうに わらっています。
examples.translation_en: (She) is laughing as if having fun.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: just finished; something just occurred. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 食事を したばかりです。
examples.translation_en: I just finished a meal.

patterns.meaning_en: just finished doing, was just doing
patterns.meaning_ja: 今〜したところ、ちょうど。
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: just finished doing, was just doing. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 今 帰った ところです。
examples.translation_en: I just got home.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: wants to do ~ (third person). See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 弟は 外に 行きたがっています。
examples.translation_en: My little brother wants to go outside.

patterns.category: Conditionals (たら / ば / なら / と)
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: if; after; when ~. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 駅に 着いたら、電話してください。
examples.translation_en: When you arrive at the station, please call.

patterns.category: Giving and receiving (あげる / くれる / もらう)
patterns.meaning_en: why don't you; how about ~ (used to give advice)
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: why don't you; how about ~ (used to give advice). See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 病院に 行ったら どうですか。
examples.translation_en: Why don't you go to the hospital?

patterns.meaning_en: what should I do?; speaker seeking instructions
patterns.meaning_ja: 何をすればいいですか。
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: what should I do?; speaker seeking instructions. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 何を したらいいですか。
examples.translation_en: What should I do?

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: conjunctive particle; so; because of. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: さむくて、でかけられません。
examples.translation_en: It's cold, so I can't go out.

patterns.category: Giving and receiving (あげる / くれる / もらう)
patterns.meaning_en: to do for; to do a favor
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to do for; to do a favor. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 母に 花を 買って あげました。
examples.translation_en: I bought flowers for my mother.

patterns.meaning_en: I want you to; need you to ~
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: I want you to; need you to ~. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: いっしょに 来て ほしいです。
examples.translation_en: I want you to come with me.

patterns.meaning_en: to start; to continue; to go on
patterns.meaning_ja: これからずっと〜していく。
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to start; to continue; to go on. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: これから だんだん さむく なって いきます。
examples.translation_en: From now on it will gradually get cold.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: was doing something (past continuous). See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 三時まで テレビを 見て いました。
examples.translation_en: I was watching TV until three o'clock.

patterns.category: Giving and receiving (あげる / くれる / もらう)
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: could you please ~. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: ちょっと 待って いただけませんか。
examples.translation_en: Could you please wait a moment?

patterns.category: Giving and receiving (あげる / くれる / もらう)
patterns.meaning_en: to do a favor; do something for someone
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to do a favor; do something for someone. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 友だちが 本を 貸して くれました。
examples.translation_en: A friend lent me a book.

patterns.meaning_en: to do and come back; to become; to continue; to start
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to do and come back; to become; to continue; to start. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: だんだん 春に なって きました。
examples.translation_en: Spring has gradually come.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: try doing. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: この ケーキを 食べて みました。
examples.translation_en: I tried this cake.

patterns.category: Giving and receiving (あげる / くれる / もらう)
patterns.meaning_en: to get somebody to do something
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to get somebody to do something. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 友だちに 写真を とって もらいました。
examples.translation_en: I had a friend take a photo (for me).

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to do something in advance. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: でかける 前に、しゅくだいを して おきます。
examples.translation_en: Before going out, I'll do my homework in advance.

patterns.meaning_en: to do by accident, to finish completely
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to do by accident, to finish completely. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: コーヒーを こぼして しまいました。
examples.translation_en: I (regrettably) spilled the coffee.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: I'm sorry for. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: おそく なって、すみません。
examples.translation_en: I'm sorry for being late.

patterns.category: Giving and receiving (あげる / くれる / もらう)
patterns.meaning_en: to do for; to do a favor (casual)
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to do for; to do a favor (casual). See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 弟に 本を 読んで やりました。
examples.translation_en: I read a book for my little brother.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: I'm glad that ~. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 雨が ふらなくて、よかったです。
examples.translation_en: I'm glad it didn't rain.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: in the process of doing. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 今、本を 読んでいる ところです。
examples.translation_en: Right now I'm in the middle of reading a book.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: even; even if; even though ~. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 雨が ふっても、行きます。
examples.translation_en: Even if it rains, I'll go.

patterns.category: Conditionals (たら / ば / なら / と)
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: whenever [A] happens, [B] also happens. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 春に なると、花が さきます。
examples.translation_en: When spring comes, flowers bloom.

patterns.pattern: と言ってもいい（といってもいい）
patterns.meaning_en: you could say; one might say; I'd say ~
patterns.meaning_ja: AといってもいいくらいB。
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: you could say; one might say; I'd say ~. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: この 本は やさしいと 言ってもいいです。
examples.translation_en: You could say this book is easy.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: called; named; that ~. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 田中という 人を 知っていますか。
examples.translation_en: Do you know a person named Tanaka?

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: convert phrase into noun. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 行くということは、お金が いるということです。
examples.translation_en: Going means needing money.

patterns.pattern: と言われている（といわれている）
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: it is said that ~. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 日本は あんぜんな 国だと 言われています。
examples.translation_en: Japan is said to be a safe country.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: I heard. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 田中さんが けっこんすると 聞きました。
examples.translation_en: I heard that Tanaka is getting married.

patterns.meaning_en: to think…; I think…; you think…
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to think…; I think…; you think…. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 明日は はれると 思います。
examples.translation_en: I think it will be sunny tomorrow.

patterns.meaning_en: among other things; such as; like ~
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: among other things; such as; like ~. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: コーヒーとか こうちゃとかを 飲みます。
examples.translation_en: I drink things like coffee and tea.

patterns.meaning_en: just about to; on the verge of doing something
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: just about to; on the verge of doing something. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: でかけようと した ところに、雨が ふってきました。
examples.translation_en: Just as I was about to go out, it started raining.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: continue to; keen on ~. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 雨が 三日も つづけて ふりました。
examples.translation_en: The rain continued falling for three days.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: named; called ~. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 田中って 人を 知っていますか。
examples.translation_en: Do you know a person called Tanaka?

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: [A] but [B]; however; comparison. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 兄は 学生だが、私は 会社員だ。
examples.translation_en: My older brother is a student, but I'm an office worker.

patterns.meaning_en: easy to; likely to; prone to; have a tendency to ~
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: easy to; likely to; prone to; have a tendency to ~. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: この 本は 読みやすいです。
examples.translation_en: This book is easy to read.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: at last; finally; barely; narrowly ~. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: やっと しゅくだいが 終わりました。
examples.translation_en: I finally finished my homework.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: than; rather than; more than ~. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: バスより 電車の 方が 早いです。
examples.translation_en: The train is faster than the bus.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: plan to, intend to. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 来週、京とに 行く よていです。
examples.translation_en: Next week, I plan to go to Kyoto.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: appears; seems; looks as if ~. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 雨が ふりそうな ようです。
examples.translation_en: It looks like it's going to rain.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: like; as; similar to ~. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 鳥の ように 歌います。
examples.translation_en: (She) sings like a bird.

patterns.meaning_en: to reach the point that; to come to be that; to turn into ~
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to reach the point that; to come to be that; to turn into ~. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 漢字が 読める ように なりました。
examples.translation_en: I've become able to read kanji.

patterns.meaning_en: to try to; to make sure that ~
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: to try to; to make sure that ~. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 早く 起きる ように します。
examples.translation_en: I'll try to get up early.

patterns.pattern: ようと思う（ようとおもう）
patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: thinking of doing; planning to ~. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: 来年 りゅうがくしようと 思います。
examples.translation_en: I'm thinking of studying abroad next year.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: by all means; certainly; definitely ~. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: ぜひ あそびに 来てください。
examples.translation_en: By all means, please come visit.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: (not) at all. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: この 漢字は ぜんぜん 分かりません。
examples.translation_en: I don't understand this kanji at all.

patterns.explanation_en: Used to express: difficult to do ~. See native-teacher review for nuance and register notes.

examples.ja: この くつは 歩きづらいです。
examples.translation_en: These shoes are hard to walk in.
